nasb.text: The sons of Midian were Ephah, Epher, Hanoch, Abida and Eldaah. All these were the sons of Keturah.

esv.text: The sons of Midian: Ephah, Epher, Hanoch, Abida, and Eldaah. All these were the descendants of Keturah.

cnv.text: 米甸的兒子是以法、以弗、哈諾、亞比大、以勒大。這些人都是基土拉的子孫。

ccb.text: 米甸的儿子是以法、以弗、哈诺、亚比大和以勒大。这些都是基土拉的子孙。
